dependent: XU100 price-only monthly nominal - TUFE_MoM = TL-real

1_primary_regression.nonoverlap: monthly forward return vs lag-1 predictor -> non-overlapping by construction

3_deployable_leg.deploy_rule: r_ex_ante(t-1) < 0 -> XU100 long; else APIFON4 cash carry
3_deployable_leg.cash_leg_note: APIFON4-derived real carry (NOT TLREF -- silent-NaN until 2022-07); clean 2019-01.

4_contemporaneous_diagnosis.status: NON-DEPLOYABLE (uses end-of-month-t rate level, not knowable at start of t)

ex_post_lag2.status: report-only, verdict-immutable (lag-2 staler; CPI also enters deflator -> caution)

secondary_report_only.change_form_delta_rea: NOT RUN as primary -- secondary/forbidden-to-rescue; LEVEL is the locked primary.

oos_gap_note: 2019-2026 is one long high-inflation regime; a true inflation-normalization OOS is ABSENT. Real rates swung from deeply negative (2021-23 repression) to positive (2024+). Deployment is a separate the project decision.
